case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOATA N.A. VS. DOUGLAS J. OERTEL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT CCP 585(D) AND RE INTEREST ACCRUED AFTER BREACH OF CONTRACT CC 3289 . FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A.
DECLARATION PER 1033CCP(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A.
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF INTEREST . FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A.
